intent: MiFID-II-compliant securities order ticket: ISIN, order type (Limit/Market/Stop), conditional limit price, quantity, time-in-force, plus inline suitability/cost-disclosure metadata and a risk-acknowledgement gate before order preview.
notes: Tier-2 banking baseline (MiFID II): models the canonical order-entry mask. Mixes a TEXT_INPUT with format check (ISIN), a RADIO_OPTION driving conditional requiredness on Limit-Preis, an integer quantity with a >=1 lower bound, and a categorical time-in-force select. Two INFORMATIVE_LABELs surface MiFID risk class and suitability outcome that originate from the Anlegerprofil and are NOT user-editable on this mask, plus one RESULT_DISPLAY for the ex-ante cost disclosure. The compliance gate is a separate RADIO_OPTION whose Required validation must be exercised in any cross-modal faithfulness anchor that asserts the mask cannot be submitted without acknowledgement.
